extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won from a controlled bunch sprint after STETINA's late breakaway attempt was reeled in by Astana's team pursuit.
tactical_patterns: STETINA in leader's jersey attacked from breakaway remnants on penultimate climb, suggesting red jersey pressure triggers aggressive racing.
NIBALI tested form on Jebel Street climb then sat up, revealing GC favorites using intermediate climbs for recon not selection.
Astana controlled finale for CORT despite no natural sprint leadout, showing team pursuit skills transfer to peloton pacing.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: broke sprint duck with Astana doing the chasing work, indicating he needs organized finale control
rider_signals.STETINA Peter: positive: attacked from breakaway while in red jersey on penultimate climb, showing willingness to defend aggressively
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: tested legs on Jebel Street then pulled back, using stage for form assessment not results
rider_signals.TERPSTRA Niki: neutral: late solo attempt from Paris-Roubaix winner suggests opportunistic attacking but lacked conviction
rider_signals.JANSE VAN RENSBURG Jacques: negative: dropped from early break before Stetina's acceleration, couldn't sustain breakaway pace
